title.en: Medical devices - Post-market surveillance for manufacturers
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 制造商上市后监督

scope.en: Guidance on post-market surveillance activities for medical device manufacturers

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on processes for post-market surveillance by manufacturers of medical devices.

title.en: Medical devices - Post-market surveillance for manufacturers - Amendment 1
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 制造商的上市后监督 - 修正案1

standards.abstract: Amendment 1 provides additional guidance on PMS processes and updates references to the latest regulatory frameworks. Published 2024.
standards.scope: Updated guidance on post-market surveillance for medical device manufacturers.

title.en: In vitro diagnostic medical devices - Clinical performance studies using specimens from human subjects - Good study practice
title.zh: 体外诊断医疗器械 - 使用人体标本的临床性能研究 - 良好研究实践

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for good clinical performance study practice for IVD device post-market performance studies using human specimens.
standards.scope: Good practice for clinical performance studies of IVD devices (PMS context).
standards.note: Relevant for PMCF-equivalent studies for IVD devices.

title.en: Guidance for the application of medical device standards related to complaint handling and the MDR/IVDR vigilance reporting
title.zh: 与投诉处理和MDR/IVDR警戒报告相关的医疗器械标准应用指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on correlating medical device complaint handling processes with EU MDR/IVDR vigilance reporting requirements.
standards.scope: Complaint handling and vigilance reporting alignment with EU MDR.
